name: Isobe Zukuri (Sashimi Wrapped in Laver)
recipeInstructions:
IN ADVANCE Cut the fresh fish into slices that are 1/2 inch thick and 6-7 inches long (as long as a sheet of nori).
TO ASSEMBLE AND SERVE:
Pass each sheet of nori over a flame to enhance its flavor and color. Place the nori flat on a hard surface (traditionally, Japanese use a bamboo mat for rolling) with the wide side of the mat facing you.
Place a long slice of fish along the length of the nori and roll the nori into a long, thick, tight cylinder. Cut crosswise into 1 1/2 inch slices using a sharp knife. Repeat this process for the remaining fish and nori sheets.
